boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: vendor name variation resolved by tax ID and master record.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL confirms tax ID and vendor master alias link is current, exact, and tied to action.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL states tax ID and vendor master alias link is current, exact, and tied to the requested action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open source-record defect; name variation alone does not block per SRC-94F130263D7B-BND and SRC-94F130263D7B-POL.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Control record matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary; dependency resolved by exact source.

final_answer: Action boundary closed by SRC-94F130263D7B-CTL confirming tax ID and vendor master alias link is current and exact. SRC-94F130263D7B-POL permits execution when source records close boundary. Name variation is not an authority defect per SRC-94F130263D7B-BND. ALLOW proceeds.
